method: in-app browser (Chromium) rendered persist_harness.html (real worker base+HERO CSS, build 40a46aa2baee).

conclusion: Acceptance (1) 100ms feedback: :active is native (<16ms) + transform transition 80ms + the picked/undo controls appear synchronously on click (Node test). (2) theme switch preserves reading position/answers/filters/expand: PROVEN across all six themes.
